ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Continued To Mar-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Shaun Carberry appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mr. Carberry stated that he would like to file a petition for final distribution in 8 to 10 weeks, that there are some legal issues with the holographic will and that there are some issues with respect to the foreign beneficiaries not understanding what he's doing. Status on close of estate is continued to March 13, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-13-2023 Continued To Jan-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jun-05-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-24-2023 Continued To Jun-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Shaun Carberry appeared in person by propria persona.

Mr. Carberry stated that he filed the Inventory and Appraisal twenty-nine minutes ago. The clerk reviewed the endorsed filed document in open court and noted that it is a partial Inventory and Appraisal. Mr. Carberry also stated that they sold the house about 30 days ago, spoke of the difficulty they had in cleaning out the house and removing mold from the house, stated that they got a good price, that they are starting to pay the bills and that the house is at 97% of the estate. Status on filing of a final inventory and appraisal is continued to June 05, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Continued To Apr-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Shaun Carberry, in court, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Petitioner that as an attorney, he has experience with probate matters. The court confirms with Petitioner that if appointed, he will be expected to do the following: open a separate estate account; keep assets segregated and fully insured; pay valid creditors; and not make any distributions unless ordered by the court. Petitioner advises that he does not anticipate any issues in closing this matter as the estate consists of only two assets. The court confirms that there are no appearances object to the petition. There being no objections, the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The holographic will dated Nov-21-2021 is admitted to probate. Shaun Carberry is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filing of Final Inventory and Appraisal is set for Mar-13-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-13-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Maloney. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-28-2022 Continued To Oct-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
